description_long: This motorcycle features a classic design with a vibrant green fuel tank and black seat, complemented by chrome and metallic accents on the engine and exhaust. The front showcases a round headlight flanked by two orange turn signals and rearview mirrors mounted on the handlebars. Spoked wheels and visible suspension components add to its vintage aesthetic, while the rear includes a red taillight, license plate holder, and additional turn signals. The side profile reveals a compact engine, chain drive, and foot pegs for both rider and passenger. The handlebars are upright, providing a comfortable riding posture, and the overall build suggests a lightweight, agile vehicle suitable for urban commuting. The materials appear to be primarily metal, rubber, and plastic, with a glossy finish on the painted surfaces.
description: A classic green motorcycle with chrome accents, spoked wheels, and a black seat, featuring a round headlight and upright handlebars. Its vintage styling and compact build make it ideal for city riding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, upright handlebars with mirrors, and front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green fuel tank, engine, spoked wheels, and chrome exhaust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate, rear fender, and dual rear turn signals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, chain drive, and rear wheel details.
